creator: jamie@proper.arpa.com
text:
(in subject) when using GENERIC as kernel config template, after removing 
	wireless device drivers from config (and missing ural) ;)  a compile fails 
	if ural is left in config file.  most devs needing dependencies have those
	dependencies noted -- it should probably be noted of this dev's subdeps 
	on wlan et al, as well

Fix: 

delete ural or re-add wlandevs
How-To-Repeat: 	above
